response.justification: Strong software engineering fundamentals and proven ability to work on large-scale systems, but critical gaps in core technical requirements. The candidate lacks explicit Spring ecosystem experience, has no Kotlin background, and shows limited recent Java depth—current role emphasizes full-stack JavaScript and AI infrastructure rather than JVM-specific development. Significant ramp-up time would be required to reach the expected Senior level expertise.
strengths: Proven track record with large-scale distributed systems handling millions of transactions and high-throughput requirements
Strong software craftsmanship practices including TDD, CI/CD, and architectural discipline demonstrated across multiple roles
IDE tooling experience from NI LabWindows/CVI work, showing understanding of language tooling internals
concerns: No Spring ecosystem or enterprise framework experience—critical explicit requirement with no mention of Spring, Quarkus, Hibernate, or similar technologies
No Kotlin experience and limited recent Java depth; current focus is TypeScript/Node.js full-stack and AI infrastructure, diverging from JVM ecosystem
Career trajectory suggests generalist full-stack engineer rather than specialist in JVM tooling and enterprise IDE development
